rationale: Educ. Code §25.0343 governs student transfers for households receiving special education services. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 25.0343. TRANSFER OF STUDENTS RESIDING IN HOUSEHOLD OF STUDENT RECEIVING SPECIAL EDUCATION SERVICES.
_note: No conflict; rule text is entirely unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
